executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Focus on testing the onboarding wizard flow at /#/onboarding and /#/register. Test registration, login, and the onboarding wizard steps (Step 1: Business Info, Step 2: Services, Step 3: Team, Step 4: Monthly Goal, Step 5: Success). Capture all console errors, UI bugs, navigation issues, and broken functionality. The app uses HashRouter so all routes start with /#/
